ab: thuini fuifuilh patashan a shinshii kmathu iamin musui ia’ianan numanuma wa lhkaribush a luluuman, itusi iamin pitaw mududur mitalha fariw sa qahil.
ch: 今天老師帶我們去動物園，我們在門口排隊買票。
en: Today the teacher took us to the zoo, and we lined up at the gate to buy tickets.

ab: mutusiza iamin ia’ianan numanuma wa lhkaribush a luluuman, fuifuilh patashan a shinshii mzai, “rumfaz itanamuqtha numa qlhuran itanarikus, shanamaniun mriqaz.”
ch: 進入動物園後，老師說:「前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。」
en: After entering the zoo, the teacher said, "There are birds in the front and snakes in the back, so you can visit them yourself."

ab: shungkash iaku sa qlhuran, numawan ani iaku amariqaz qlhuran.
ch: 我會怕蛇，所以我不看蛇類。
en: I'm afraid of snakes, so I don't look at snakes.

ab: iaku mriqaz rumfaz mathuaw manasha, thaithuy isui kawi mathuaw mafarfaz, mriqaz iaku mani shmadia malhus isai kawi a mabraq a itmaz.
ch: 我看到了很多鳥，他們在樹上飛來飛去，還有看到貓頭鷹在樹洞裡睡覺。
en: I saw a lot of birds flying around in the trees and saw owls sleeping in tree hollows.

ab: ia’ianan numanuma wa lhkaribush a luluuman ianan sa thumay, tishmamraw numa rukzaw, ani iaku kahiwan mriqariqaz izai a lhkaribush, mathuaw iaku thuini maqaran tu mriqaz.
ch: 動物園裡有熊、馬和老虎，我從前沒有看過這些動物，今天看到了真的很開心。
en: There are elephants, horses and tigers in the zoo. I have never seen these animals before. I was really happy to see them today.

ab: pashtiruq iaku manasha sa pinashtiruq pariqaz naak a ama ina.
ch: 我拍了很多照片，給爸爸媽媽看。
en: I took a lot of pictures and showed them to my parents.

ab: amunai iaku musuun naak a ama ina ya kahiza.
ch: 下次要跟爸爸媽媽一起來。
en: Next time I will come with my parents.
